Tomorrow we sit down with @chainlink and @trmlabs  to talk governance for AI agents that transact on their own. 

Forward this to whoever owns compliance at your company, because the hour covers exactly what they keep asking about: enterprise exposure, the agentic threat landscape, cryptographic proof of execution, and controls that hold up in an audit.

@iban_ginto @chainlink @trmlabs Thanks for reaching out - the team is reviewing your support request now and will follow up soon!

supercharge your @claudeai or Codex with a wallet it actually knows how to use.

one MCP connection gives your agent a funded USDC account on @base, governed by per-call and total spending limits you define up front. from that point, every x402 priced API on the market becomes a tool it can reach mid task.

in the run below, Claude needed live Apollo data to finish a company record. it read the price off the 402 response, confirmed the charge cleared its policy, paid, and kept working through five paid calls until the table was complete and the email had passed SMTP verification.

everything the agent spends lands in one dashboard with hashes attached, and the same connection works for any client that speaks MCP. the model brings the intelligence and the wallet lets it finish.
@PaulCaf Agree with your insights. Looking forward to our turn to show the market the Taskmarket
